Class Room

java.lang.Object
Room
Direct Known Subclasses:
TransporterRoom
public class Room extends Object
Room, store information of a room, location, items and possible exits
Author:
Minh Quang TRAN

  • Constructor Details

    • Room

      public Room(String pDescription, String pImage)
      hashmap
      Parameters:
      pDescription - - description of a room
      pImage - - image name on the file (to be put on the game)

  • Method Details

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      to get description (a String) of a room
      Returns:
      aDescription

    • setExits

      public void setExits(Room north, Room east, Room south, Room west)
      set initial exits
      Parameters:
      north - - north exit
      east - - east exit
      south - - south exit
      west - - west exit

    • setExit

      public void setExit(String direction, Room r)
      set single exit for a new room (location)
      Parameters:
      r - - the room in the direction (exit) added
      direction - - new direction set to a room

    • getExit

      public Room getExit(String direction)
      go to the direction base on the input of the player
      Parameters:
      direction - - direction following the user command word
      Returns:
      exits.get(direction)

    • isExit

      public boolean isExit(Room pBackRoom)
      detect wether or not the room (paramètre) exit in the HashMap "exits"
      Parameters:
      pBackRoom - - the room to be "backed"
      Returns:
      this.exits.containsValue(pBackRoom)

    • addItem

      public void addItem(Item item)
      add and Item to the room
      Parameters:
      item - - item to be added to the room in the contructeur par défaut

    • removeItem

      public void removeItem(String itemNom)
      Parameters:
      itemNom - - item to be taken

    • getExitString

      public String getExitString()
      return all of the possible exit of a room avoid coupling in getLocationInfo and no exit
      Returns:
      sExit - the string that contain all the exits possible of a room

    • getItemList

      public ItemList getItemList()
      return the list of the room
      Returns:
      this.aRoomsItem;

    • getRoomItemString

      public String getRoomItemString()
      getItemString is already declared in itemlist so the name is changed to getRoomItemString()

    • getRoomItemString1

      public String getRoomItemString1()
      getItemString is already declared in itemlist so the name is changed to getRoomItemString()

    • getShortDescription

      public String getShortDescription()
      return the description of the room
      Returns:
      aDescription

    • getLongDescription

      public String getLongDescription()
      print the current info, including the current location, items and exit once we add items or monster we only need to change this class
      Returns:
      "You are " + this.aDescription + '\n' + getExitString() + '\n' + getItemString()

    • getImageName

      public String getImageName()
      Return a string describing the room's image name
      Returns:
      aImageName
